forbidden_changes: do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
do not only scale all coefficients
do not reintroduce terminal_reward without separation into crash and landing bonuses
do not construct success_like preference pairs
required_changes: replace terminal_reward with separate crash_penalty (sufficiently negative, e.g., -10 or more) and safe_landing_bonus (stringent conditions: both legs, low speed, small angle, sustained contact)
restructure approach_progress to strongly penalize early_failure trajectories (e.g., negative bias when progress is small or speed/angle are high, or quality-based scaling to widen margin)
preserve progress-conditioned gating and components that favor partial_progress
maintain conservative mutation strategy until coverage improves

intended_fix: condition reward by progress or stability stage
expected_effect: Handle stage-dependent task conflicts and discourage low-progress survival.
risk: Stage gates may be imperfect before trajectory memory is available.
